title: Evidence-card JSON Schema + ajv validation in CI
context: The evidence-card JSON Schema is the structural contract every card validates against, implementing the compliance policy spec (-compliance-001). It encodes identity, biology, clinical associations, and governance, and is enforced by ajv in CI. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Author the evidence-card JSON Schema covering identity, biology, clinicalAssociations[], and governance, and wire ajv validation into CI so an invalid card fails the build and every clinical association requires an evidenceLevel plus at least one citation and provenance entry.
acceptanceCriteria: JSON Schema covers identity (with HGNC/SO/HGVS/Mondo refs), biology, clinicalAssociations[] (claim, associationType, direction, populationContext, evidenceLevel+framework+version, citations[], provenance[], uncertaintyNote), governance (riskTier, reviewStatus, reviewers[], lastVerified, validUntil, disclaimer, cardLicense)
ajv validation runs in CI; an invalid card fails the build; evidenceLevel and >=1 citation + provenance are required on every clinical association
output: schema/evidence-card.schema.json plus CI ajv validation wiring
